backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining gym management system with member profiles, diet/workout charts, attendance tracking, video storage, membership packages, pause requests, and GPS-based location verification for check-ins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two high-confidence features: member authentication handling for reactivated memberships and membership status update flow with query invalidation.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of frontend files including authentication flows, member/admin dashboards, GPS location verification, pause request handling, and query cache management.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind directives and OKLCH color system tokens defining light and dark theme variables for a fitness-focused purple/blue color scheme.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with page title 'RawFit Gym - Think Fit, Be Fit' and root div for React mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main app component managing authentication routing for admin/member flows, health check monitoring with prolonged loading detection, production version notice, and URL-parameter-controlled smoke test overlay.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Access denied screen component displaying error message with logout functionality and query cache clearing.
frontend/src/components/admin/Attendance: Admin interface for managing member attendance with manual check-in/out, member search, attendance history table, and QR code generator integration. Displays attendance records with method badges (QR scan, manual, auto) and status indicators.
frontend/src/components/admin/DashboardT: Admin dashboard overview displaying statistics cards for total members, diet charts, workout charts, and packages, plus pause request notifications and quick action guidance.
frontend/src/components/admin/DietFormDi: Dialog form for creating and editing diet charts with dynamic meal management, allowing addition/removal of meals with nutritional information (calories, protein, carbs, fats).
frontend/src/components/admin/DietsTab.t: Admin tab for viewing and managing diet charts with search functionality, displaying diet cards with meal counts and descriptions that open the edit dialog on click.
frontend/src/components/admin/GymQRCodeG: Generates and displays a gym-specific QR code for member attendance scanning, with auto-refresh every 30 minutes, countdown timer, and download functionality.
frontend/src/components/admin/MemberForm: Dialog component for creating and editing gym members with form fields for personal info, membership package selection, diet/workout assignments, date pickers, discount calculation (percentage or flat), and status management. Includes loading skeletons, error boundaries, and INR currency formatting.
frontend/src/components/admin/MembersTab: Admin tab displaying all gym members in a searchable card grid with membership status badges (Active/Paused/Expired), package details, and INR pricing. Provides add/edit member functionality via MemberFormDialog.
frontend/src/components/admin/PackageFor: Dialog form for creating and updating membership packages with fields for package type, duration in months, and price in INR. Includes live price preview formatting and handles BigInt conversions for backend compatibility.
frontend/src/components/admin/PackagesTa: Admin tab for managing membership packages with searchable card grid display, INR price formatting (total and per-month), and edit/delete actions with confirmation dialog. Integrates PackageFormDialog for CRUD operations.
frontend/src/components/admin/PauseReque: Notification card component displaying pending membership pause requests with member names, timestamps, and approve/deny actions. Includes confirmation dialogs with optional admin message input for request responses.
Admin tab component for viewing and managing member pause requests with approve/deny actions, status badges, and confirmation dialogs with optional admin messages.
frontend/src/components/admin/VideoLibra: Admin tab for managing workout video library with search functionality, video grid display, and upload dialog integration.
frontend/src/components/admin/VideoUploa: Dialog component for uploading workout videos with metadata (title, category, description), file selection, and progress tracking using ExternalBlob.
frontend/src/components/admin/WorkoutFor: Dialog form for creating and editing workout charts with dynamic exercise list management (add/remove exercises with sets, reps, and instructions).
frontend/src/components/admin/WorkoutsTa: Admin tab displaying workout charts in a searchable grid with create and edit functionality via WorkoutFormDialog.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React error boundary component catching rendering errors and displaying fallback UI with retry functionality.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Header component displaying RawFit Gym branding with logo, tagline, and user profile dropdown menu including logout functionality.
frontend/src/components/member/MemberDas: Main member dashboard component displaying profile, diet, workout, attendance history, and membership status with pause/resume functionality. Includes QR attendance card and handles membership package display with pricing.
frontend/src/components/member/MemberHea: Header component for member portal showing gym logo, branding, and user dropdown menu with avatar, profile info, and logout functionality.
frontend/src/components/member/MemberMem: Card component displaying membership status (active/paused/expired) with visual indicators and pause request status alerts including admin messages.
frontend/src/components/member/MemberVid: Video library tab that verifies user location against gym geofence before allowing access to workout reference videos.
frontend/src/components/member/QRAttenda: QR code scanner component for gym check-in/check-out that validates location proximity and processes scanned QR codes for attendance recording.
frontend/src/components/ProductionVersio: Displays an alert banner when the reported backend version doesn't match the expected production version, using different severity levels (error/warning) and icons.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for new users to complete their profile by entering name and email, with form validation and loading states during submission.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance with Internet Identity authentication and admin token initialization, invalidating dependent queries on actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation using @dfinity/auth-client.
frontend/src/hooks/useMemberAuth.ts: Manages member authentication state via localStorage, providing login/logout functions and validating member IDs against the backend actor with query cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend operations including user profiles, member management, diet/workout charts, attendance, videos, and membership packages with mutations and cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark themes, defining colors for UI components like sidebar, cards, buttons, and charts.
frontend/src/lib/currencyUtils.ts: Utility functions for formatting numbers as Indian Rupees (INR) with proper locale formatting, including per-month calculations and coercion from legacy dollar formats.
frontend/src/lib/locationUtils.ts: Provides geolocation utilities using Haversine formula to calculate distances and verify if users are within authorized radius of gym coordinates via browser Geolocation API.
frontend/src/lib/qrCodeUtils.ts: Handles QR code generation and validation for gym attendance, including checksum-based security, timestamp validation, and parsing for both gym scanner and member QR codes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Main admin dashboard page with tabbed navigation for managing members, diets, workouts, packages, attendance, videos, and pause requests. Includes header and footer with caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLoginPage.tsx: Admin login page using Internet Identity authentication with error handling, retry logic, and loading states. Displays branding and hero image with back navigation to login selection.
frontend/src/pages/LoginSelectionPage.ts: Landing page that presents two login options (Admin and Member) with branding, hero section, and transition handling between selection and specific login pages.
frontend/src/pages/MemberDashboard.tsx: Member dashboard page with two tabs (My Dashboard and Video Library) featuring responsive design and caffeine.ai footer attribution.
frontend/src/pages/MemberLoginPage.tsx: Member login page with membership ID input, error handling, retry logic, backend health checks, and connection diagnostics. Includes branding and back navigation.
frontend/src/release/expectedProductionV: Version management utilities defining expected production version (v1.2.1) with normalization and comparison functions for backend version validation.
Defines a production smoke-test checklist (Version 37) with test items categorized as admin, member, or health checks, covering login flows, dashboard functionality, and pause request workflows.
frontend/src/release/SmokeTestOverlay.ts: Production smoke test overlay dialog with categorized checklists (health, admin, member), progress tracking, and backend version verification for release validation.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom color schemes using OKLCH color space, extended border radius variables, animations, and plugins for typography and container queries.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file documenting a known issue where members cannot login after admin reactivates paused memberships, with pending feature requests to fix backend validation logic.
